Admin:1234
Admin:Same as network key or WIFI key. Can be found on a sticker on the back of the modem.
Admin:admin
Admin:ipbbx
Admin:password
Admin:root
Admin:sky
Admin:telus
Admin:user
admin:1234
admin:Same as network key or WIFI key. Can be found on a sticker on the back of the modem.
admin:admin
admin:ipbbx
admin:password
admin:root
admin:sky
admin:telus
admin:user
ipbbx:1234
ipbbx:Same as network key or WIFI key. Can be found on a sticker on the back of the modem.
ipbbx:admin
ipbbx:ipbbx
ipbbx:password
ipbbx:root
ipbbx:sky
ipbbx:telus
ipbbx:user
root:1234
root:Same as network key or WIFI key. Can be found on a sticker on the back of the modem.
root:admin
root:ipbbx
root:password
root:root
root:sky
root:telus
root:user
user:1234
user:Same as network key or WIFI key. Can be found on a sticker on the back of the modem.
user:admin
user:ipbbx
user:password
user:root
user:sky
user:telus
user:user
